codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature description and expected behavior: upload choices are collapsed into one RadioSet with one primary action, unavailable GitHub options are hidden, best-path selection is defaulted, upload action routing is correct, manual path is non-error toned, github-gpg temp files are cleaned up via finally, and subprocess error handling prevents crashy failure paths. Tests were expanded to cover the new behavior matrix and robustness cases.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit diff, transcript skeleton, and skill guidance for link-my-key-collapse. No blocking or non-blocking defects were found in scope; the feature appears complete and aligned with VAL-NAV-022/023 and VAL-FLOW-016/017/018/019/020/021/033/034/036 requirements.
